description: 16 - 06-01-2025 - Emails between lan Collard (former Chief Property and Security Officer. FCDO) and Michael Roberts (Assurance Deputy Director, CO), and others

participants.name: Emails between lan Collard
participants.role: former Chief Property and Security Officer. FCDO

text:
FCDO) and Michael Roberts (Assurance Deputy Director, CO), and others

. . 6 January 2025 at 09:16
Re: Urgent vetting question

Vita Maynard Personal
To: JCS
Cc: Michael Roberts Personal , Tom Bramley Personal
GCSOPrivateOffice Mailbox Personal

Adding JCS for info / removed lan - Tom, let us know, helpful to get our joint lines straight before any questions!
On Mon, 23 Dec 2024 at 15:05, lan Collard * Personal wrote:

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Michael

Thanks. Tom and | have discussed, and we are proceeding with a clearance in the usual way. I’m sure Tom can fill
you in!

Thanks for coming back.

Best wishes,
lan

lan Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH
Mobile/WhatsApp: Personal

From: Michael Roberts Personal

Sent: Monday, December 23, 2024 3:00:42 PM

To: lan Collard *”°"°" Tom Bramley Femoral

Cc: GCSOPrivateOffice Mailbox Personal ; Jcs

; Vita Maynard
Subject: Re: Urgent vetting question

lan hi,
Am off today so not sure if someone has come back to you.
But yes, Policy as set at GSB in October is that members of the HoL are exempt from NSV.

Michael

‘On Mon, 23 Dec 2024, 11:12 lan Collard *, Personal wrote:
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Michael, Vincent's team,

Gerard McGurk was in touch last week about the expected (now confirmed) appointment of Lord Peter Mandelson
as the next UK Ambassador to Washington.

The specific question was whether Lord M is exempt from a UKV process (specifically for DV clearance) as a
member of the House of Lords?

We think CO say he is exempt. But we want to double check given the policy around public appointments, and
whether that alters the calculation?

44

He plans to begin duties (though not his posting) in early Jan, so time is of the essence.

Best wishes,
lan

lan Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH
Mobile/WhatsApp: Personal

Follow us online: www.gov.uk/fedo

This email is intended for the addressee(s) only: All messages sent and received by the Foreign,

Commonwealth & Development Office may be monitored in line with relevant UK legislation

45
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.

messages.subject: Urgent vetting question
messages.body:
lan hi,
Am off today so not sure if someone has come back to you.
But yes, Policy as set at GSB in October is that members of the HoL are exempt from NSV.

Michael

‘On Mon, 23 Dec 2024, 11:12 lan Collard *, Personal wrote:

Michael, Vincent's team,

Gerard McGurk was in touch last week about the expected (now confirmed) appointment of Lord Peter Mandelson
as the next UK Ambassador to Washington.

The specific question was whether Lord M is exempt from a UKV process (specifically for DV clearance) as a
member of the House of Lords?

We think CO say he is exempt. But we want to double check given the policy around public appointments, and
whether that alters the calculation?

44

He plans to begin duties (though not his posting) in early Jan, so time is of the essence.

Best wishes,
lan
